reapack.name: SK Drums Generator.lua
reapack.desc: SK Drums Generator : 16-step drum sequencer with velocity layers, presets and MIDI export

reapack.name: SK Harmonic Compass.lua
reapack.desc: SK Harmonic Compass : Circle of fifths chord inserter with voicing, modes and patterns

reapack.name: SK Analog Drift Engine
reapack.desc: SK Analog Drift Engine : Analog tape and cassette drift simulator with wow, flutter and saturation
